variants.name: 百牲祭
variants.ability: 在你死亡的当晚，镇民的咒语不会被抽中。每个夜晚*，如果大于等于五名玩家存活，你可以选择死亡。[+1外来者]
variants.otherNightReminder: Ask the Hecatomb if they'd like to die (if less than 4 players are alive, they cannot). If yes, kill the Hecatomb. If the Hecatomb is dead, place the "Sacrificed" token on them. No Townsfolk Spells can be cast tonight.
